overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed open world game showing a cowboy character walking along a dirt trail through rolling grassland prairie. A rider on horseback passes by midway through the clip, and the character continues past a wooden signpost where the trail diverges into two paths.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie grassland with winding dirt trail

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along dirt path through tall grass prairie with relaxed gait

entered.detail: winding dirt path cutting through tall grass, showing wagon wheel ruts
tall green and golden prairie grass swaying gently
solitary oak trees dotting the rolling landscape
dense forest visible on the horizon beneath cloudy sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks alone along a winding dirt trail through expansive grassland. The prairie stretches out in all directions with scattered oak trees and a distant tree line visible under a partly cloudy morning sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: prairie trail with passing horse rider

events.description: cowboy on horseback enters from right and trots past ahead on the trail

agents.ego_description: continuing along trail as a horse rider passes by on the right and moves ahead

notable_agents.action: cowboy on white horse riding past the character and continuing ahead along the trail

segments.scene_description: A rider on horseback suddenly enters from the right, trotting past the character and continuing ahead along the same trail. The rider gradually moves into the distance as the character maintains a steady walking pace through the open prairie.

scene_state.functional_zone: prairie trail with wooden signpost and diverging paths

events.description: passing weathered wooden trail signpost on the left side of the path
trail splits into two diverging paths, character continues straight on left fork

agents.ego_description: walking past wooden signpost and continuing along the left fork where the trail diverges

entered.detail: weathered wooden trail marker with directional arms, mounted on tall post

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes a weathered wooden signpost on the left. The trail then splits into two diverging paths, and the character continues straight onto the left fork while the right fork curves away through the tall grass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a winding dirt trail that transitions from a solitary trek through open prairie to a point of divergence. It begins with the character walking alone through expansive grasslands dotted with scattered oak trees under a partly cloudy morning sky. As the journey continues, a rider on horseback enters from the right and trots past, gradually receding into the distance while the character maintains a steady pace. The scene then shifts as the character approaches and passes a weathered wooden signpost on the left. Finally, the trail splits into two diverging paths, with the camera following the character as they proceed onto the left fork while the other path curves away into the tall grass.
